arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) uniquely identifying the S3 object.

body.description: The content of the S3 object.

bucket_key_enabled.description: Indicates if the bucket key for server-side encryption is enabled.

cache_control.description: Specifies caching behavior along the request/reply chain.

checksum_crc32.description: The CRC32 checksum of the object data.

checksum_crc32c.description: The CRC32C checksum of the object data.

checksum_sha1.description: The SHA1 checksum of the object data.

checksum_sha256.description: The SHA256 checksum of the object data.

content_disposition.description: Specifies how the content should be presented to the user.

content_encoding.description: Specifies what content encodings have been applied to the object.

content_language.description: The language the content is in.

content_length.description: The size of the content in bytes.

content_type.description: The MIME type of the content.

etag.description: The entity tag for the object.

expiration.description: The expiration date of the object if lifecycle is configured.

expires.description: The date and time the object is no longer cacheable.

id.description: The ID of the S3 object.

last_modified.description: The date and time when the object was last modified.

metadata.description: A map of metadata for the object.

object_lock_legal_hold_status.description: The legal hold status of the object.

object_lock_mode.description: The lock mode currently in place for this object.

object_lock_retain_until_date.description: The date until which the object is locked.

server_side_encryption.description: The server-side encryption algorithm used when storing this object.

sse_kms_key_id.description: The ID of the AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key used to encrypt the object.

storage_class.description: The storage class of the object.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the object.

version_id.description: The version ID of the object, if bucket versioning is enabled.

website_redirect_location.description: The redirect location for the object, if configured as a website.
